description_long: This is a wooden bunk bed featuring two stacked single beds, each with a simple rectangular frame and slatted guardrails on the sides. The bed frame is constructed from light-colored wood, giving it a natural and sturdy appearance. Both the upper and lower bunks are equipped with white mattresses and loosely draped white bedding, with a pillow visible on the top bunk. A small vertical ladder is attached to the side, providing access to the upper bunk. The headboards and footboards are solid panels, adding to the structural integrity and safety of the design. The overall style is functional and minimal, suitable for shared sleeping spaces such as dormitories, hostels, or urban apartments.
description: A light wood bunk bed with two stacked single beds, white bedding, and a side ladder. The design is minimal and functional, with solid headboards and slatted guardrails.
description_view_0: Front-side view showing both bunks, the slatted guardrails, and the attached ladder on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid headboards and footboards, with bedding visible on both bunks.
description_view_2: Direct front view displaying the slatted guardrails on both bunks and the ladder at the center.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid panels of the headboards and footboards, with bedding visible on the top bunk.
